title: Chef Aid Non-Stick Carbon Steel Baking Tray, Durable Non Stick Coating, Fridge and Freezer Safe, Perfect for Baked Goods and Roasting, 43 x 29 x 2cm, Robust Essential Oven pan, Black
features: NON-STICK: This durable non stick coating will easily remove cooked, grilled and baked foods time and time again; The non stick is PFAS, PTFE and BPA free
IDEAL SIZE: This 43 x 29 x 2cm and inner dimensions of 38.3 x 24.4 x 2 cm, non-stick baking tray is the ideal size for most conventional ovens, including electric, gas and ranged cookers
STORAGE: This Chef Aid Oven Tray is robust and stackable for easy storage, handwash recommended

FREEZER AND FRIDGE SAFE: This essential Cake Tin can store baked goods in the fridge or freezer; The ability to go from freezer to oven is ideal for pre baking, and reheating from frozen when needed to keep baked goods fresher for longer

CHEF AID: The Chef Aid non-stick cookware range is a well-loved and very popular range that caters for every individual and offers a complete range of solutions for the home and is ideal for everyday use
description: From the brand Previous page Chef Aid is the most affordable brand and offers an extensive range of products for the kitchen and home.
